payload.title: NYCT Operating Efficiencies
payload.description: Presentation on NYC Transit operating efficiencies including customer satisfaction goals, cost reduction strategies, and deep dives on e-mirrors, employee availability, station agents, and energy savings

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: NYC Transit is achieving its goal to improve customer satisfaction 10% by June 2024, while creating operating efficiencies
Transport Workers Union - landmark agreement redefines the role of Station Agents

tool_args.label: Recurring savings achieved to date FY23

payload.raw_value_text: declined a total of 20 days between 2001 and 2021
~1,800 collisions in 2022, 25% of all bus collisions

tool_args.label: Bus mirror collisions as percentage of all bus collisions
Scheduled trips cancelled due to no operator 2022

payload.raw_value_text: ~3% of scheduled Subway and Bus trips cancelled because no operator was available

tool_args.label: Employee availability improvement over past year

payload.raw_value_text: >2 day improvement in availability over the past year

payload.claim_text: NYC Transit is achieving its goal to improve customer satisfaction 10% by June 2024, while creating operating efficiencies
payload.subject: NYC Transit

tool_args.label: Four strategies to reduce operating costs

payload.claim_text: Four strategies to reduce operating costs: Harness technology and data to improve productivity; Develop common standards and best practices; Sharpen management focus on cost drivers; Invest capital to reduce operating expenses
payload.subject: NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Bus is exploring e-mirrors as a solution to eliminate physical mirror and associated collisions
payload.subject: NYC Transit Bus

tool_args.label: New Station Agent program with TWU

payload.claim_text: Landmark agreement with TWU redefines the role of Station Agents and how they are deployed, providing better customer service including 15 new Customer Service Centers, increased hourly pay for Station Agents, and lower total costs to NYCT including overtime reduction
payload.subject: NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Reducing energy consumption both lowers costs and greenhouse gas emissions. Initiatives include continuing to install LED lighting throughout Subway system and on trains, replacing legacy boilers with energy efficient units, rolling out new Energy Management System, conducting energy audits on facilities, installing rapid roll-up doors at depots, and piloting Regenerative Braking
payload.subject: NYC Transit

tool_args.label: Collaboration with MNR and LIRR to reduce contractor costs

payload.description: Collaborate with Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Railroad to reduce contractor costs in common areas

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: Landmark agreement with TWU redefines the role of Station Agents and how they are deployed
Explore e-mirrors to reduce collisions - provide as good or better visibility to drivers leveraging camera footage displayed in the cab, eliminate physical mirror and associated collisions
Continuing to install LED lighting throughout Subway system and on trains to reduce energy consumption and greenhouse gas emissions
Rolling out new Energy Management System, and working with utilities to record actual vs. estimated usage
Piloting innovative technologies such as Regenerative Braking
Installing rapid roll-up doors at depots as part of campaign to reduce HVAC usage and expense
Predictive maintenance as part of harnessing technology and data to improve productivity

tool_args.label: Employee availability decline causes and impacts

payload.claim_text: Lower availability requires maintaining reserve staff and paying overtime to backfill critical roles. In '22, ~3% of scheduled Subway and Bus trips cancelled because no operator was available. Decline driven by increase in days off for Workers' Compensation and Sick Leave, a long-term trend predating COVID. Increasingly, small number of employees drive the majority of days off.
payload.subject: NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Efforts underway to improve availability include: Recognizing employees with perfect or exemplary attendance; Scaling successful Aware & Care program for employees working with managers improve their attendance record; Joint workgroups with Labor to reduce number of assaults on employees; Addressing employee feedback received from NYCT-wide engagement survey; Safeguard leave programs against abuse to preserve them for employees that need them
payload.subject: NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Improve employee availability, insource cleaning positions, renegotiate with top suppliers
payload.subject: NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Pursue green energy investments, optimize Total Cost of Ownership of non-revenue fleet, improve maintenance productivity by enhancing shop layout and equipment
payload.subject: NYC Transit
